diagrams.title: Two-Phase Locking Protocol
diagrams.description: Shows the growing and shrinking phases of 2PL with lock acquisition and release timeline
diagrams.purpose: Understanding 2PL protocol phases and lock management

diagrams.title: Serializability Graph
diagrams.description: Precedence graph showing transaction dependencies for conflict serializability check
diagrams.purpose: Determining if a schedule is conflict serializable

diagrams.title: Wait-for Graph (Deadlock Detection)
diagrams.description: Graph showing which transactions are waiting for which other transactions
elements: Edges T1->T2 means T1 waiting for T2's lock
diagrams.purpose: Detecting deadlocks in lock-based concurrency control

diagrams.title: Validation-based Concurrency Control Flow
diagrams.description: Three-phase model showing Read, Validation, and Write phases

diagrams.title: Timestamp-based Concurrency Control
diagrams.description: Timeline showing read and write timestamps for data items
elements: Data items with RTS and WTS
